title: Small Caps Font
description: Changes the Minecraft font to a small caps one!
body:
![The project's banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MEDOXZFt/images/d9b60cf27bff2d9f18b4e1e5f2522b334d924ab3.png)

Small Caps Font

This resource pack changes the Minecraft font to a small caps one. I've made some improvements from the similar already in vanilla, such as changing the numbers and modifying the symbols and characters. You can check it out for yourself below or in the gallery!

![The font's alphabet. More characters than shown in the picture exist.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MEDOXZFt/images/b4f18eb891a216ac8a510a9d8795f3f393988d29.png)![The fonts numbers.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MEDOXZFt/images/4da9b885e3fabccdde4966dfc257dd9f3a7761b9.png)![The font's special characters.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MEDOXZFt/images/7b2249d24385c9f9dd7832c6646ad8b6424f4ca9.png)
